description_long: This is a stylized angel doll with a round head, short brown hair, and a cartoonish face featuring large eyes and a small mouth. The doll wears a simple white dress with a jagged hem, and has a pair of white feathered wings attached to its back. A golden halo floats above the head, emphasizing the angelic theme. The arms are short and slightly bent at the elbows, with hands resting on the hips. The overall design is playful and whimsical, with exaggerated proportions and smooth, matte surfaces. The doll appears to be made primarily of plastic, with painted details and lightweight construction.
description: A whimsical angel doll with a white dress, feathered wings, a golden halo, and short brown hair, featuring a cartoonish face and playful proportions.
description_view_0: Rear three-quarter view showing the back of the head, the halo, and the jagged hem of the dress, with one wing and one arm partially visible.
description_view_1: Direct rear view highlighting the back of the head, both wings fully extended, and the symmetrical flow of the dress.
description_view_2: Opposite rear three-quarter view with the other wing and arm visible, showing the halo and the layered dress from a different angle.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the doll's face, both wings, the golden halo, and the full front of the dress with hands on hips.
attribute_clothing_style: Simple white angelic dress with a jagged hem, no visible patterns or embellishments, evoking a classic cherubic or Christmas angel theme.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms bent and hands resting on hips, head facing forward, wings extended outward, and legs together beneath the dress.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with wide, open eyes, slightly raised eyebrows, and a small, straight mouth.
attribute_hair_style: Short, straight brown bob with even length around the head.
